backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the press kit backend, managing CMS content (about text, features, game details, social links, iframe src, password protection) and user profiles with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the actor state from the old schema to the new schema by adding the `iframeSrc` field with an empty default value.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: adding an Iframe URL field to the Admin Dashboard CMS panel and rendering a responsive iframe on the Press Kit page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with Fredoka One and Inter Google Fonts preloaded and a single root div for mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /press-kit, /admin), wraps the app in ThemeProvider, and applies the backend-driven body text color globally.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Overlay component that displays a single screenshot fullscreen with keyboard (Escape) and click-to-close support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Minimal site header showing only the Press Kit nav link and a dark/light mode toggle, hidden on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Image component that shows a pulsing skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that triggers a direct browser download of the press kit ZIP file.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup UI with an email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future integration.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: A modal component that prompts users for a password to access the press kit, using the verifyPassword mutation and storing verification state in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Renders a responsive grid of six game screenshots that open in a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Displays an Instagram icon link button, rendering nothing if the provided URL is invalid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button overlay; clicking it replaces the thumbnail with an embedded YouTube iframe using a parsed embed URL.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Returns a backend actor instance (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend content (about text, features, game details, social links, colors, etc.) and password verification.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and utility styles for backgrounds, screenshots, modals, and transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin CMS dashboard page gated by Internet Identity authentication and a hardcoded admin principal, allowing the admin to view and update all press kit content fields (about text, features, game details, social links, password protection, iframe, body text color) with per-field save feedback.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying the game logo and a 'View Press Kit' button linking to /press-kit, with a header, background, and footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Public press kit page that fetches CMS content, optionally shows a password gate modal, and renders sections for the game logo, video, optional iframe, about text, features, game details, screenshots, media download, and social/contact links.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode via class, registering custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), OKLCH-based design-token colors, border radii, box shadows, and accordion/fade-in keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 23) describing the app's architecture, known issues, and the full list of implemented features for a black-and-white game press kit site with a public landing page, password-gated press kit, and Internet Identity-protected admin CMS.
